zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Baldwin Mountfort於大約1412年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特時，他的父親Sir William de Montfort38歲，母親Margaret Peche27歲。他於大約1430年與Joane De Vernon在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年2月10日在英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Baldwin Mountfort于大约1412年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝斯可特时，他的父亲Sir William de Montfort38岁，母亲Margaret Peche27岁。他于大约1430年与Joane De Vernon在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝斯可特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年2月10日在英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mountfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mountford
meanings: English (Staffordshire; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montfort-sur-Risle (Eure) or from one or other of various places called Montfort in France (from Old French mont ‘hill’ + fort ‘fortress’). Early forms of this name are indistinguishable from those of Mundford in Norfolk, perhaps indicating an alternative habitational name (see Munford ).

History: A Norman bearer of this name, from Montfort-sur-Risle in Eure, near Brionne, accompanied William the Conqueror in his invasion of England in 1066. Simon de Montfort, 6th Earl of Leicester, led a rebellion against Henry III (1216–1272).

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. In the Middle Ages it was a comparatively common name, which gave rise to a surname. It was borne by the Norman crusader Baldwin of Boulogne, who in 1100 was elected first king of Jerusalem, and by four further crusader kings of Jerusalem. It continued to be used by some families in England into the 17th century, but in modern times it normally represents a transferred use of the surname rather than a direct revival of the Norman given name.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Baldwin Mountfort was born about 1412, in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Montfort, was 38 and his mother, Margaret Peche, was 27. He married Joane De Vernon about 1430, in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 February 1475, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Baldwin Mountfort est né environ 1412, à Bescot, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Montfort, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Peche, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joane De Vernon environ 1430, à Bescot, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 février 1475, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Baldwin Mountfort um 1412 in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Montfort 38 und seine Mutter Margaret Peche 27. Er hat um 1430 in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joane De Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Februar 1475 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Baldwin Mountfort è nato il circa 1412 nel Bescot, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de Montfort, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Peche, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Joane De Vernon circa 1430, nel Bescot, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 febbraio 1475, nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin Mountfortが約1412年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベスコトで生まれた時，父Sir William de Montfortは38歳，母Margaret Pecheは27歳であった。約1430年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベスコトでJoane De Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1475年2月10日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Baldwin Mountfort(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Montfort(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Peche(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베스컷에서 Joane De Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 2월 10일 영국 워윅실르 콜레시에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Baldwin Mountfort nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Montfort, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Peche, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane De Vernon aproximadamente 1430, em Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1475, em Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Baldwin Mountfort родился около 1412 г. в местности бескот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Montfort было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Peche, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane De Vernon около 1430 г. в местности бескот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 февраля 1475 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Baldwin Mountfort nació aproximadamente 1412, en Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Montfort, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret Peche, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Joane De Vernon aproximadamente 1430, en Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de febrero de 1475, en Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
